name: codex-inter-agent-messaging
description: On-demand messaging between registered Codex agents through one authenticated bridge owner.

interface.shortDescription: Send explicit requests to registered Codex peers
interface.longDescription: Adds caller-bound MCP tools for synchronous, asynchronous, inbox, and group messaging through a race-safe per-user bridge host.
defaultPrompt: List the Codex agents I can message.
Ask a registered Codex agent for help.
